programme.title: E7 - Champions Of Breakfast
programme.desc: Will Kellogg is on top of the cereal industry after beating out Post, but now, the king of cereal has met his match with a young flour mill executive. A decades-long war for dominance ensues.

programme.desc: For centuries, fantastic tales of terrifying monsters have fascinated mankind. Bizarre beasts of all shapes and sizes have been portrayed in some of history's most classic stories and folklore.

programme.title: E2 - The Lifesavers
programme.desc: Meet a border collie that protects aircraft from lethal bird strikes, a sprocker spaniel whose sense of smell is saving imperilled water voles, and an Anatolian shepherd that helps conserve Africa’s most endangered big cat, the cheetah.

programme.title: E3 - Crowded Seas
programme.desc: Dip into North America’s southern coastal waters, where opalescent squid mate, sea turtles nest, and mobula rays take flight for the sake of romance. Fly a specialized drone with Lizzie as she swoops in for a breath sample from a blue whale.

programme.title: E4 - The Queen is Back
programme.desc: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods, and power outages. Try to pin down the elusive Badalo before his data-gathering tag drops off and meet a new female the team is eager to study.

programme.title: E1 - The Rescuers
programme.desc: Dogs around the world come to the rescue in surprising ways. Some search for survivors when disaster strikes or rescue animals from poachers and wildlife traffickers. Others help us in times of trouble—both on land and in the water.

programme.title: E2 - The Lifesavers
programme.desc: Meet a border collie that protects aircraft from lethal bird strikes, a sprocker spaniel whose sense of smell is saving imperilled water voles, and an Anatolian shepherd that helps conserve Africa’s most endangered big cat, the cheetah.

programme.title: E4 - Ice
programme.desc: Trek to the planet’s quickly melting poles, where animals are giving scientists clues about our future existence. Learn how the movements of polar bears, penguins, and other arctic creatures could help humans map (and prevent) global warming.

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands
programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E1 - The Rescuers

programme.desc: Track scientists who have arrived in the Kalahari to test a hypothesis: that animal collaboration is the key to the dizzying diversity of the region’s species. Observe as they monitor behavior, decipher data, and deliver fascinating conclusions.

programme.title: E38 - Mayor Stan
programme.desc: Myrtle declares Stanley Mayor for a day. He soon finds there is a dance class and new barn to open with lots of ribbon cutting, and he even fits in making a Bowling alley.

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E1 - The Tooth Brushing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath.

programme.title: E16 - Lychee
programme.desc: Love and peace symbol, Lychee, performs his song - 'All You Need is Lychee!'

programme.title: E15 - Parsnip
programme.desc: Parsnip performs a jaw dropping escape that will leave even Houdini speechless.

programme.title: E51 - Waltzing Potato
programme.desc: Evil Pea plans to freeze Supertato into an ice cube by pretending to teach him to dance.

programme.title: E52 - Broccoli's Movie Night
programme.desc: Broccoli screens Supertato: The Movie, but Evil Pea has plans to change the story.

programme.title: E4 - Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: E30 - Pan-American Highway, Panama
programme.desc: The team's Pan-American road trip leads them to discover that Glitch is building a road through the Darien Gap. Can they save this important habitat and protect the local sloths?

programme.title: E50 - Shaun
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble.

programme.title: E18 - Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: E8 - Andy And The Grizzly Bear Cubs
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen & Scout head to Alaska, in America, on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of fish being buried underground. Along the way, Andy meets a grizzly bear cub setting out on its first fishing trip with its mother to catch salmon.

programme.title: E26 - The Obstacle Course Badge
programme.desc: It's time for the annual Animal Obstacle Course Race. The animals need to work together in teams to complete the course.

programme.title: E25 - The Going Slow Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.desc: Myrtle declares Stanley Mayor for a day. He soon finds there is a dance class and new barn to open with lots of ribbon cutting, and he even fits in making a Bowling alley.

programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: E44 - In Bergerac (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Bergerac, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Perigord caviar.

programme.title: E7 - The Contours Of The Soul/Louis, Sound-Seeker
programme.desc: Portraits of Pierre-Yves Gabioud, painter in Val Ferret, Switzerland, where nature is his muse; and Louis Jucker, an artist without boundaries, musician, poet, punk and DIY enthusiast...

programme.title: E17 - Marcel Marongiu/''se Mettre Sur Son 31''/Sake/Red
programme.desc: From fashion to painting, the designer Marcel Marongiu presents his pictures at the Poliakoff Gallery. Encounter. All about the French expression ''se mettre sur son 31'' (dressing to the nines). Wakaze creates sake made in France. Red alert: but how best to wear it?

programme.title: E44 - In Bergerac (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Bergerac, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Perigord caviar.

programme.title: E7 - The Contours Of The Soul/Louis, Sound-Seeker
programme.desc: Portraits of Pierre-Yves Gabioud, painter in Val Ferret, Switzerland, where nature is his muse; and Louis Jucker, an artist without boundaries, musician, poet, punk and DIY enthusiast...

programme.title: E4 - Blending The Old With The New
programme.desc: The Monastery of the Augustinian Sisters has been redesigned as a hotel complex focusing on harmony between the old and the new. At the Verdun Auditorium, the new arena perfectly sits side by side with the 1938 Art Deco wing and the beautiful EcoRad radiators.

programme.title: E53 - Singapore Laksa Soup In Aubusson
programme.desc: In Creuse, Alessandra Montagne meets Diana, a Singaporean chef who revisits recipes from her ancestors in her restaurant. On today's menu: laksa soup, an iconic Singaporean dish made with spicy broth, coconut milk, noodles, chicken, and Vietnamese coriander.

programme.title: E44 - In Bergerac (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Bergerac, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Perigord caviar.

programme.title: E7 - The Contours Of The Soul/Louis, Sound-Seeker

programme.title: E16 - Lucille Boitelle/Gabriela Hearst/Mathieu Casseau
programme.desc: In the heart of Lyon, the Musee des Beaux-Arts houses 90,000 works of art. Lucille Boitelle is an ornamental painter who creates worlds that embellish any surface. Sensual and ethereal: the show by Uruguayan designer Gabriela Hearst. In Douarnenez, ceramist Mathieu Casseau handles clay with vigour and gentleness.

programme.title: E44 - In Bergerac (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Bergerac, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Perigord caviar.

programme.title: E12 - The Legacy Of The Middle Ages With Luc Arbogast
programme.desc: In Saint-Antoine-l'Abbaye, Loic Ballet meets Luc Arbogast, an artist passionate about medieval music. Together, they will uncover the secrets of this commune with exceptional cultural richness.

programme.title: E44 - In Bergerac (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Bergerac, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Perigord caviar.

programme.title: E10 - Airelles At Versailles Palace, Rather An Immersion Than A Visit
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: E8 - In Search Of The Wild/Two Women And A Vacherin
programme.desc: Into the wild with Vincent, upholsterer by day and, for the rest of the time, wildlife film-maker, between the Jura and the Alps. Then we discover the secrets of Mont d'Or vacherin cheese in the Joux Valley, Switzerland. Close friends and artisans, Daniele and Marianne perfectly complement one another.

programme.title: E9 - Universities/Farmers/Comedy Club/Stuffed Cabbages
programme.desc: In the summary: should French universities ban political lectures; farmers are feeling the impact after the floods; a comedy club set up in a ski lift; a focus on the World Stuffed Cabbage Championships in Limoges...

programme.title: E5 - Avalanche Control
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas explore Rogers Pass, a favorite among Rocky Mountain skiers. They also learn about avalanche control techniques required to make this once-inaccessible area safe.

programme.title: Kung Fu Vs Acrobatic
programme.desc: Two men fall journey into the far-reaches of China, but stumble upon a cave where Princess Wendy, her handmaid Mandy, and evil Tin have been in suspended animation for 800 years...

programme.title: Righting Wrongs
programme.desc: Ha Ling Ching, a mild-mannered prosecutor who takes the law into his own hands, when the legal system fails to capture the most notorious criminals. As the police assign a tough, gutsy inspector Cindy to stop Ha's vigilante hunting out of court, another murder brings them together in the search for the real killer, who may or may not be one of their own!

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Country boy Lee Tong has the knack of getting into trouble with great regularity. But this time, he has to beat it all the way to the city. And the first thing that happens to him in the city is to have his pocket picked. In chasing the thief, Lee meets young girl Fanny and knocks out No.1 ball player King by accident. Fanny and her brother Suen take Lee in. The two boys decide to adopt soccer as their profession. The ball club owned by King employs Lee only because King wants to settle the score with the boy. Lee Tong suffers all kinds of humiliations. Yet he presses on...

programme.title: Gorgeous
programme.desc: C.N. faces his greatest challenge when he meets young country girl Bu and falls in love! But when Howie sets a trap for him, C.N. must prepare to fight for his lady and his life!

programme.title: Beauty Queen: Nina Li: Aces Go Places V
programme.desc: White Glove steals terra-cotta warriors and Brother and Sister disguise themselves as the 'ACES' partners King Kong and Kodajak to steal the Sword of Chin Dynasty from White Glove. White Glove swears to revenge on the 'ACES' partners. The real and new 'ACES' partners will join together with police to fight against White Glove.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Country boy Lee Tong has the knack of getting into trouble with great regularity. But this time, he has to beat it all the way to the city. And the first thing that happens to him in the city is to have his pocket picked. In chasing the thief, Lee meets young girl Fanny and knocks out No.1 ball player King by accident. Lee Tong suffers all kinds of humiliations. Yet he presses on...

programme.title: Aces Go Places V
programme.desc: White Glove steals terra-cotta warriors and Brother and Sister disguise themselves as the 'ACES' partners King Kong and Kodajak to steal the Sword of Chin Dynasty from White Glove. White Glove swears to revenge on the 'ACES' partners. The real and new 'ACES' partners will join together with police to fight against White Glove.

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E7 - Twinkle's Bedtime Lullaby
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! Blippi shrinks down to fly inside a beehive & learn how honey is made, & explores a garbage truck to find out why flies love it so much. Then, it’s a trip through a factory to see how chocolate is made! The adventure even travels through time as Blippi meets his great-grandpa to see the very first cars. Plus, Blippi & FETCH help a nervous crane learn to build a skyscraper!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E1 - Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!

The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E13 - Too Late for Love
programme.desc: Romano’s fashion model ex-girlfriend uses him in an effort to aid a gang of fur thieves.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Major decisions face Kennedy. He begins to send troops to Vietnam. He also vows to send a man to the moon by the end of the decade.

programme.title: E21 - Nitro
programme.desc: The IMF find themselves only a second away from eternity when they intercept a nitroglycerine expert who plans to blow up the government house of a small country thus provoking war with its neighbor nation.

programme.desc: Sunny goes in search of D.A. Page Ferguson, who she fears may be in danger. She finds Ferguson just in time to witness her fall from the top of a parking garage.

programme.desc: The series depicts the stories of Pompeii's citizens with the threat of Mount Vesuvius bringing chaos and destruction. Arbaces's machinations and the persecution of Christians add to the growing tension.

programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: E4 - 楊宗緯催淚獻唱
programme.desc: 全新互動音樂節目，以「星素結合」的形式全民共唱。100位素人歌手將通過現場K歌贏得機會成為三位幸運歌手，與每集的大咖歌手進行合唱挑戰，實現自己的夢想。大咖歌手嘉賓包括孫楠、羽泉等。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E28 - 偶像型男掀搶人大戰
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E16 - 心血管疾病知多少 (下)
programme.desc: 全新研發的大型互動健康科普節目；從「重治療」到「重預防」，加大醫療健康知識的深度普及，把權威的資訊送到身邊。

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E3 - 老歌新唱兩代人一起蹦
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E4

programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. programme.desc: Ben heads to northern England and stays with host Paul in Lincolnshire onboard his 30-year-old converted military truck. He discovers why Paul traded living in a house for life on the road.

programme.desc: Discover how 9.7 billion cups of Danone's Activia yogurt are made every year; how to make trail mix both healthy and delicious; why less mixing makes more tasty organic baby cookies; and why timing is everything when making powerhouse mushroom rice veggie burgers.

programme.title: Really Remarkable Robotics
programme.desc: What role do robots play in the future of mankind? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of robotics. Have hands-on fun by creating your own robot, and get to know Hiroshi Ishiguro, a pioneer of humanoid robotics, known as the man who copied himself.

programme.title: Melissa Millett: Amazing Pets
programme.desc: Melissa trained her dog and cat to become a record-breaking duo. She shares with Alan Pixsley the fundamentals of animal training and what it takes to become the very best. But what will be the one thing that Alan can learn from Melissa and his new furry friends?

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: The Black Death
programme.desc: The Black Plague is running rampant through Europe, leaving death and destruction in its wake! This episode provides a catalog of the effects the plague has on the human body and the various weird and wonderful cures dreamed up by the contemporary medics.

programme.title: Never Give Up
programme.desc: Things aren't looking great for our Ice Stars as Kloe's lacking confidence, Josh returns home to some shattering news, and ice dancer Ella realises she'll need to work harder to keep the Adriella partnership alive.

programme.title: Trip to Jordan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo clash over their school show poster-Zoe colors while Milo writes the title. Alim suggests writing from the right, surprising them. In Jordan, they meet Souria preparing a puppet show and learn to write Arabic... from right to left!

programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Howler isn't exactly a paragon of cleanliness! But seeing as he's got a soft spot for Dove, he needs to step up the hygiene if he wants to win her heart! So he introduces us to various medieval hygiene techniques.

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Really Remarkable Robotics
programme.desc: What role do robots play in the future of mankind? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of robotics. Have hands-on fun by creating your own robot, and get to know Hiroshi Ishiguro, a pioneer of humanoid robotics, known as the man who copied himself.

programme.title: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: When Anabella breaks a mirror, she worries that she's going to have bad luck, and refuses to go through with her Irish dancing recital! But are superstitions real? They travel to Blarney, Ireland to try to find a four-leaf clover to turn her luck around.

programme.title: Coffee Filter
programme.desc: Who says coffee is the only thing filters are used for? See how we turn this day to day object into something fun.

programme.title: Silly Laws
programme.desc: Pessi decided to put their cloud up for sale because they don't deserve its good view. The silly laws forbid them from being happy. But Pessi wrote the laws himself. Now, Sprinter and Leo must try to convince him to rewrite the laws so he and Opti can be happy again.

programme.title: How do plants eat and drink?
programme.desc: How can we prove plants and flowers drink water? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of botany. Have hands-on fun by making a rainbow-coloured flower, and get to know J.C. Bose, an amazing polymath who pioneered studies into the nature of plants.

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Howler isn't exactly a paragon of cleanliness! But seeing as he's got a soft spot for Dove, he needs to step up the hygiene if he wants to win her heart! So he introduces us to various medieval hygiene techniques.

programme.title: How do plants eat and drink?
programme.desc: How can we prove plants and flowers drink water? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of botany. Have hands-on fun by making a rainbow-coloured flower, and get to know J.C. Bose, an amazing polymath who pioneered studies into the nature of plants.

programme.title: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: When Anabella breaks a mirror, she worries that she's going to have bad luck, and refuses to go through with her Irish dancing recital! But are superstitions real? They travel to Blarney, Ireland to try to find a four-leaf clover to turn her luck around.

programme.title: Alex Goulding and Jimmy Choi: Feats of Strength Duo
programme.desc: Ninja warrior Jimmy and fitness fanatic Alex reveal how they worked together to achieve the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most consecutive double high-five push-ups! The powerful duo meets Aisheshek Magauina and shares what it takes to work as a team.

programme.title: Mihaela Brinzoiu: Pan Crushing Hands of Steel
programme.desc: Mihaela Brinzoiu is a formidable strongwoman who holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most frying pans rolled in one minute, achieving ten successfully rolled-up pans. She meets Alan Pixsley and shares her story of becoming a strongwoman.

programme.title: Rockets & Propulsion
programme.desc: Emily examines how rockets are made, how they blast off, and how they make their way through the Earth's atmosphere. Plus, she travels to NASA's Wallops Flight Facility for an all-access pass as the crew prepares for the launch of the Antares Rocket.

programme.title: Trying Something New
programme.desc: As well as becoming a gymnastic superstar, tumbler Jay has had another ambition for as long as he can remember, to become a world-class stuntman. And he's in luck, his coach, Chris, is friends with stuntman Damien and is taking Jay to meet him.

programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Howler isn't exactly a paragon of cleanliness! But seeing as he's got a soft spot for Dove, he needs to step up the hygiene if he wants to win her heart! So he introduces us to various medieval hygiene techniques.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: International Cross-Strait Critics
programme.desc: The global situation is changing rapidly, and the interactions between the two sides of the Taiwan Strait and the four regions are frequent, with every action closely related. 'International Cross-Strait Critics' has different experts who will guide you from the superficial to the profound, helping you grasp the development context, deconstruct the major trends, and gain insights into new domains.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Min-ho's adulterous lover Se-hee is murdered in the hotel where the two of them spent time together. Apart from Min-ho, there is no trace of anyone else having been there. Immediately singled out as the prime suspect, Min-ho maintains his innocence, and he hires the lawyer Shin-ae, who has a 100% record of victory in court, to defend him. In order to prove his innocence, she asks Min-ho to confess to her the entire truth. He admits that a car accident that they were in the day before the murder may be connected in some way to Se-hee's death.

programme.title: The Monkey King 3
programme.desc: On the conflict-packed journey to the West for the scriptures, escorted by Sun, Bajie and Sha, Xuanzang, the Tang Priest, accidentally enters the Womanland of Western Liang, a mysterious nation where no men has ever been existed. The Queen falls for Xuanzang at first sight, without knowing what love is, thinking she could be terminally ill with incurable lovesickness. The Preceptor warns her that men are all poisonous creatures and orders to kill Xuanzang and his disciples. With the help of the Queen, the four flee the execution site, but later Xuanzang, Bajie and Sha carelessly drink the water from the Motherhood River that makes them pregnant rapidly. Wukong tries to save the three with his almighty transforming sorcery, when Xuanzang gradually loses his stand to falls in love with the Queen. The trespass of the four outsiders also agitates the God of River Oblivion, who completely breaks the peace of the Womanland. The River God floods the whole nation in a fury and puts i

programme.title: Grand Maison Paris
programme.desc: After their restaurant 'Grand Maison Tokyo' earned a Michelin three-star, Natsuki Obana and Rinko Hayami venture to Paris to open 'Grand Maison Paris,' aiming to become the first Asian chefs to achieve the same honor. However, they face cultural challenges and intense pressure in a city filled with culinary masters. Following a mishap at a gala dinner, Obana makes a pact with his former mentor: he will leave France if they don't earn three stars in the next Michelin evaluation. Can Obana and his team overcome these obstacles to achieve their dream?

programme.title: Lady Cop & Papa Crook
programme.desc: Senior Inspector Molline Szeto is assigned to investigate the kidnap of a boy, whose father is the kingpin of illegal red oil in Greater China, John Fok.

programme.title: I Remember
programme.desc: Fei Li is a 30-year-old IT specialist who had a secret crush on Zhao Ximan, a girl from the business department. One day, their company went on a year-end trip to Finland. At the end of the trip, Ximan accidently fell off from the ski field. The next day when she woke up in the hospital, a temporary amnesia caused a lose of her short term memory for one day. As for Li, this is an unexpected chance, he made Ximan believe that they were in love. Before Ximan could recall all the memory, Li had one day to play the role of her boyfriend.

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: After the chaos, afternoon business begins-only to be met with an unexpected torrential downpour in Palbok-dong. Min-seok's team, the most vulnerable to the rain, faces an emergency.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Braised pork knuckle is an auspicious dish served in weddings, birthday dinners, and Lunar New Years. Chef Garrison Cheng, makes a twist on classic pork knuckle by using braising and frying techniques.

programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families.
